meaning: n.圣地,礼拜堂,非国教徒的教堂
examples: So they went down to Bethel.
And the house of Joseph sent to descry Bethel.
When they sent men to spy out Bethel (formerly called Luz).
In 1969, the Woodstock Music and Art Fair concluded near Bethel, New York.
Fast-forward here, we're wrapping up our sixth season right now at Bethel Woods.
